title: The Abstraction Ladder
description: A visual representation of how abstraction simplifies complex reality in Java, starting from concrete implementation details and moving up to a generalized interface.
elements: Concrete Implementation (e.g., a specific Car engine)
relationships: A Concrete Implementation 'implements' the details defined by an Abstract Class
An Abstract Class 'provides a blueprint' and can 'implement' an Interface
An Interface 'defines a contract' of what must be done, without any implementation details
